name: Kolte-Patil Developers Limited
summary: Kolte-Patil Developers Limited operates as a real estate company in India. It constructs and develops residential projects, commercial and retail projects, IT parks, and integrated townships; rents immovable properties; and provides project management services for managing and developing real estate projects. The company markets its projects under the Kolte-Patil and 24K brands. Kolte-Patil Developers Limited was founded in 1991 and is based in Pune, India.
